event_description: User submits their email address to receive an OTP verification code.
User clicks the Google or GitHub OAuth button to begin OAuth sign-in.
User successfully authenticates (OTP verified or OAuth completed) and a session is established.
User clicks a plan card on the subscription page and is redirected to Stripe checkout.
User switches between monthly and annual billing on the subscription page.
User confirms cancellation of their active subscription.
User successfully completes a plugin purchase.
User creates a new project, either blank or by uploading a file.
Admin sends an invitation for a new team member to join the organisation.
Admin changes the role of an existing team member.
Admin removes a member from the organisation.
